emails.content_summary: Re-introduce All Clean. Provide a highly valuable checklist for spring property maintenance. Crucial: Include two distinct links ('Homeowners Guide' vs 'Business Owners Guide') to trigger Sender.net tags for future segmentation.
emails.cta: Click to read your specific guide (Soft CTA to reply for a quote)

emails.content_summary: Direct offer for a combined Window + Gutter cleaning package. Highlight the visual transformation and protection it offers.
emails.cta: Reply 'SPRING' to this email to claim your $50 off and book a call.

emails.content_summary: Educational piece on how mold, algae, and dirt degrade exterior materials over time, leading to costly repairs.
emails.cta: Reply to book a free exterior assessment call.
emails.subject_idea: Is grime secretly damaging your siding?

emails.content_summary: Time-sensitive offer for pressure washing (driveways, siding, commercial walkways). Emphasize instant curb appeal.
emails.cta: Click here to book your pressure washing slot (Only 10 spots available).

emails.content_summary: Showcase expertise. Briefly explain the professional equipment and techniques used vs. DIY methods. Include a strong customer testimonial.
emails.cta: Reply to get a custom window cleaning quote.
emails.subject_idea: Behind the scenes: How we get windows 100% streak-free

emails.content_summary: Leverage the 1000+ list to generate warm leads. Explain the referral program: they get a $50 credit for their next clean, and their friend gets $50 off their first service.
emails.cta: Forward this email to a friend or reply with their contact info.

emails.content_summary: Focus on the psychological benefits of a clean space. For residential: more family time. For commercial: higher employee productivity and better client impressions.
emails.cta: Reply to discuss a recurring cleaning schedule.
emails.subject_idea: Reclaim your weekends (and your peace of mind)

emails.content_summary: Offer focused on interior deep cleaning as summer ends. Great for post-summer resets for homes and offices.
emails.cta: Click to book your Deep Clean and get a free oven/fridge add-on.
emails.subject_idea: The 'Back to Routine' Deep Clean Special

emails.content_summary: High-value warning about ice dams, foundation damage, and roof leaks caused by ignoring fall gutter cleaning.
emails.cta: Reply to get on our Fall Gutter schedule before we book up.
emails.subject_idea: Why Edmonton winters destroy clogged gutters

emails.content_summary: Push for early bookings for gutter cleaning. Create urgency around the impending freeze.
emails.cta: Reply 'GUTTERS' to lock in your spot and get 10% off.
emails.subject_idea: Early Bird Fall Gutter Cleaning (Secure your spot)

emails.content_summary: A comprehensive checklist for preparing a property for an Edmonton winter. Includes things we do (gutters) and things they should do (shut off exterior water).
emails.cta: Reply if you need help checking off the exterior tasks.

emails.content_summary: End of season wrap-up. Offer to lock in current rates for recurring services next year, or pitch winter commercial cleaning contracts.
emails.cta: Reply to set up your recurring contract and beat the price increase.
emails.subject_idea: Lock in 2024 pricing for next year
